description: Age-stratified COVID-19 case/fatality data, 11 countries + Diamond Princess, >750k cases
source: von Kügelgen et al. 2020 (verified GitHub repo)
proposed_title: COVID-19 Age-Stratified Case Fatality Rates by Country (2020)
encoding_note: Already aggregated: Cases = "Confirmed cases", Successes = "Confirmed cases" - "Confirmed fatalities" (survivors). Treatment = Country (multiple levels), Stratum = Age group (0-9, 10-19, ..., 80+). Simpson's paradox arises when comparing CFR across countries with different age distributions.
